heading: Forfeiture of vessels owned by citizens of insurrectionary States
label: 223 Forfeiture of vessels owned by citizens of insurrectionary States
text: From and after fifteen days after the issuing of the proclamation, as provided in , any vessel belonging in whole or in part to any citizen or inhabitant of such State or part of a State whose inhabitants are so declared in a state of insurrection, found at sea, or in any port of the rest of the United States, shall be forfeited.section 205 of this title
notes: CodificationR.S. § 5319 derived from , .act July 12, 1861, ch. 3, § 712 Stat. 257
amendments: CodificationR.S. § 5319 derived from , .act July 12, 1861, ch. 3, § 712 Stat. 257
